theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3: Pastel & Soft (with a Neo-Brutalist twist)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Messaging apps require high legibility and an approachable, optimistic vibe. By blending soft pastels (Lavender, Mint, Butter Yellow) with sharp 1px borders and high-contrast typography, we avoid the generic 'clinical SaaS' look and create a tactile, indie-modern feel that is distinctly memorable. The app feels fast but human.

headings.description: Expressive geometric sans. Never use Inter for headings.

body.description: Highly readable, clean sans for dense chat logs.

app_layout.structure: 3-column hybrid layout (Sidebar: 320px fixed, Main Chat: fluid, Details: 300px fixed/collapsible).

cards_and_containers.classes: bg-white dark:bg-[#16161D] rounded-2xl border border-black/5 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

glassmorphism.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border-b border-black/5 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm backdrop-saturate-150

chat_bubbles.sent: rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-4 py-2
chat_bubbles.received: rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm bg-background-surface border border-border text-text-main px-4 py-2 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-background-surface border border-border text-text-main hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-transparent border border-border rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-text-muted

badges.unread: bg-accent text-accent-foreground font-bold rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs shadow-sm

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST change appearance on hover. Lift cards slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade and slide-up (y: 10 to y: 0) with opacity 0 to 1.

microinteractions.typing_indicator: Three bouncing dots with staggered animation.
microinteractions.message_appear: Framer motion scale-up from origin (bottom-right for sent, bottom-left for received).

icons.guidelines: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, delicate appearance. Do not mix filled and outlined icons randomly.

landing_page.hero_section: Asymmetrical layout. Massive H1 on the left (text-5xl to text-7xl), right side features a dynamic floating bento grid of chat UI fragments over the `marketing_background`. Never center everything.
landing_page.features: Bento Grid (Mode A). Use generous padding (p-8 to p-12) inside cards. High contrast visuals.
landing_page.cta: Large geometric container, pastel background, heavy bold typography prompting user to 'Start Chatting'.

authentication.layout: Split screen. Left side: Abstract pastel geometric art or brand messaging. Right side: Clean, form-focused login/register. No noisy backgrounds behind the form.
authentication.form: Use the 'Tactile' card style. Inputs must have clear focus states.

chat_application.sidebar: Collapsible on mobile. Contains search bar (rounded-xl) and list of conversations. Use progressive disclosure: hover over a chat to reveal pin/archive actions.
chat_application.conversation_window: Header is glassmorphism. Background is `background_base`. Input area is fixed at bottom with blur effect. Messages use high-contrast bubbles.
chat_application.profile_panel: Right-side drawer. Shows avatar, media gallery grid, and settings. Use minimalist list rows with crisp bottom borders.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure primary text meets 4.5:1 ratio. The primary button text MUST be #111111 to contrast with the pastel #D4C5FF background.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="send-message-button"`, `data-testid="chat-list-item-user1"`).
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all inputs and buttons (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary`).
